scripts.dev:server: if [ -d src/server/cmd/server ]; then go run ./src/server/cmd/server; elif [ -d src/server/cmd/api ]; then go run ./src/server/cmd/api; else echo '[dev:server] Skipping: src/server not present yet.'; fi
scripts.test:server: if [ -d src/server ]; then cd src/server && go test ./...; else echo '[test:server] Skipping: src/server not present yet.'; fi
scripts.check:server: if [ -d src/server ]; then cd src/server && go test ./...; else echo '[check:server] Skipping: src/server not present yet.'; fi
